raw: {"perspective": "Product Strategist", "findings": [{"severity": "P0", "file_or_area": "src/assessment/irt_engine.py", "issue": "IRT parameters (a, b, c, theta) are hardcoded, preventing model calibration from real-world data. This invalidates CAT logic and undermines AURA score validity.", "recommended_fix": "Refactor irt_engine.py to ingest item response data from Supabase `assessment_responses` table. Implement monthly MML calibration pipeline via script/irt_calibrate.py. Store item parameters in `irt_parameters` table with versioning."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "P0 scoring integrity risk: AURA scores are not psychometrically valid without empirical calibration. findings.issue: IRT parameters (a, b, c, theta) are hardcoded, preventing model calibration from real-world data. This invalidates CAT logic and undermines AURA score validity.
findings.recommended_fix: Refactor irt_engine.py to ingest item response data from Supabase `assessment_responses` table. Implement monthly MML calibration pipeline via script/irt_calibrate.py. Store item parameters in `irt_parameters` table with versioning.

whistleblower_flag: P0 scoring integrity risk: AURA scores are not psychometrically valid without empirical calibration. Current implementation violates ADR-004 and Constitution Foundation Law 1 (Never Red — integrity failure).
